steps.title: Use the setting clue
steps.content: The passage says kestrels' surroundings can significantly affect hormone levels. Therefore, a result comparing captive and wild kestrels should reasonably show a hormone difference between those settings.

steps.title: Select the setting difference
steps.content: A says captive and wild kestrels are similar, which conflicts with the clue. B discusses individual differences, not study setting. C is about chickadees, not kestrels. A captive-versus-wild hormone difference in kestrels fits the passage's logic. The answer is D.
